reviews.comment:
Muy buenos los chipa! Serví compras muy completo. Personal muy atento y predispuesto, nos explicaron acerca de las rutas. Baños limpios y completos.

(Translated by Google)
The chipa was delicious! The shopping service was very complete. The staff was very attentive and helpful; they explained the routes to us. The restrooms were clean and fully equipped.

reviews.comment:

Good station, the only bad thing was that there were 2 people working, which made everything slow and caused vehicles to accumulate.
